task_completion.description: The agent accessed the 'Document Metadata Compliance Standards' document in the Projects workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Document Metadata Compliance Standards' document open and being read in the Nuxeo web interface.

task_completion.description: The agent updated the metadata of non-compliant documents to meet the standards.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Nuxeo 'Edit' tab for documents with modified metadata fields (such as description, coverage, or subjects) being saved.

task_completion.description: The agent tagged the remediated documents with 'compliance-reviewed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'compliance-reviewed' visible on the document summary page or tagging interface for the remediated documents.

task_completion.description: The agent added a comment to the remediated documents describing the corrections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Comments' section of the remediated documents showing a new comment that describes the metadata corrections made.

task_completion.description: The agent updated the lifecycle state of documents with expired dates (e.g., transitioning to 'Obsolete').
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document view showing a changed lifecycle state (e.g., 'Obsolete' state visible in the document header or lifecycle tab) for an expired document like 'Contract-Template'.

task_completion.description: The agent created a collection named 'Q4 2025 Compliance Audit' and added the remediated documents to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Collections interface showing a collection named 'Q4 2025 Compliance Audit' that contains the documents which were edited, tagged, and commented on.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Nuxeo web UI (menus, document views, edit forms) being used. No terminal windows or code editors executing scripts should be used to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the remediation steps on the documents rather than just moving unmodified documents into the collection.
integrity.visual_evidence: Documents inside the 'Q4 2025 Compliance Audit' collection show actual evidence of the required changes (tags, comments, metadata edits) when viewed.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected outcome in a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within the Nuxeo Document Management System, not typed out in a local text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires auditing documents against the 'Document Metadata Compliance Standards' reference document. Remediated documents must have updated metadata, a 'compliance-reviewed' tag, and a comment describing the corrections. Documents with expired dates (e.g., 'Contract-Template') must have their lifecycle state transitioned to 'obsolete'. All remediated documents must be added to a newly created collection named 'Q4 2025 Compliance Audit'.
